summary: Iteration 26 Phase C follow-up: backend company_code POST/PATCH fix VERIFIED end-to-end. Backend pytest 13/13 pass (9/9 in test_iter25_phase_c.py + 4/4 new test_iter26_company_code_smoke.py). Regression pytest across iter20/22/23/24/25/26 = 38/38 pass, no regressions. FE end-to-end also VERIFIED via ephemeral super_admin session: typed 'sks' -> UI shows 'SKS', Submit creates company with company_code='SKS' (confirmed via DB + /api/companies), and Edit modal prefills 'SKS'. Cleanup complete; super_admin PIN fields untouched.

minor.issue: CompanyUpdate does not use `model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid')`, so unknown fields are silently swallowed. Non-blocking; hardening suggestion only.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' observed on /companies. Non-blocking, cosmetic-only for RN-web preview. Reference: repeated across styled components using shadow* keys.

action_items: OPTIONAL (hardening): Set `model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid')` on CompanyCreate/CompanyUpdate so typos in fields fail-fast instead of being ignored.
OPTIONAL: Migrate RN-web deprecated `shadow*` style props to `boxShadow` for cleaner console output (cosmetic only).
MAIN AGENT: iter-26 Phase C fixes are FULLY VERIFIED. Safe to move on to next feature/iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L2101-2141 create_company now validates company_code shape (regex 2-8 [A-Z0-9]), uppercases, and returns 409 on DuplicateKeyError. Matches PATCH behaviour. LGTM.
server.py L2201-2236 edit_company treats empty-string company_code as no-op (del updates['company_code']) — matches spec. LGTM.

Test hard-coded prefix 'SKS' in test_sequential_codes_and_patch was overlapping the SKS company that the sibling test now correctly creates (post-fix). Updated the test to use per-run prefix `IT26<RUN_HEX>` to keep tests independent. TEST-ONLY change.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter25_phase_c.py (updated test prefix to avoid intra-suite collision after backend fix)
/app/backend/tests/test_iter26_company_code_smoke.py (new smoke tests: invalid shape 400, 2-char OK, duplicate 409, blank patch no-op)

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 iter25 + 4/4 iter26 smoke + 38/38 regression across iter20/22/23/24/25/26)
success_rate.frontend: 100% for the Phase C scope tested: /companies Create modal end-to-end (type sks -> SKS -> Save -> DB row has company_code='SKS' -> Edit prefill='SKS').

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral only: one session for seeded super_admin (auth_method='test_seed') inserted then deleted; one FE test company 'IT26FE Test Co' created via UI and DELETEd via API. All iter-25/26 pytest artefacts (companies IT25*/IT26*, +919<stamp>* users, legacy hyphenated employee_code) auto-cleaned by module-scope teardown. Super_admin doc (pin_hash / pin_must_change / pin_fail_count / pin_locked_until) NOT touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-26 Phase C is fully green. If a future iteration adds more company_code paths (e.g., bulk import, migration script) reuse /app/backend/tests/test_iter26_company_code_smoke.py as the regression harness. The seeded super_admin at sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com should NEVER have its PIN reset; use pymongo to insert an ephemeral session with auth_method='test_seed' to bypass PIN gating for backend testing.
rca_of_issue: Not applicable — no unresolved bugs this iteration. The single lingering pytest failure at the start (test_sequential_codes_and_patch) was an artefact of the sibling test now succeeding: both tests were racing to claim company_code='SKS'. Root cause: test used a hard-coded prefix that overlapped its neighbour after the backend fix. Mitigation: switched to per-run unique prefix `IT26<RUN_HEX>` (test-only change, no product code touched).
